base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_level_6_clock_tower — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 castlevania. Clock Tower tileset — gears, chains, moving cog platforms, pendulum supports. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Clock Tower tileset — gears, chains, moving cog platforms, pendulum supports; tan/brown + black palette. Features iconic gear-mesh animation
